message:
feat(semantic): add Ollama as alternative embedding backend

Adds Ollama embedding support for environments where the default
@xenova/transformers ONNX runtime fails (WSL1, bundled Bun executables).

- Add embeddingBackend config option ("xenova" | "ollama", default "xenova")
- Implement embedTextOllama and batchEmbedOllama using Ollama's /api/embed
- Wire backend selection into embedText(), batchEmbed(), warmupEmbeddings()
- Configure backend at command entry points (context, similar)
- Descriptive error messages for connection refused, model not found
- Update getSemanticStatus to display active backend info
- Update test factory with new config field

Usage: set embeddingBackend: "ollama" and embeddingModel to an Ollama
model name (e.g. "all-minilm", "nomic-embed-text") in config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -403,6 +403,7 @@ export const ConfigSchema = z.object({
   crossAgent: CrossAgentConfigSchema.default({}),
   semanticSearchEnabled: z.boolean().default(false),
   semanticWeight: z.number().min(0).max(1).default(0.6),
+  embeddingBackend: z.enum(["xenova", "ollama"]).default("xenova"),
   embeddingModel: z.string().default("Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2"),
   verbose: z.boolean().default(false),
   jsonOutput: z.boolean().default(false),

@@ -61,6 +61,7 @@ export function createTestConfig(overrides: Partial<Config> = {}): Config {
     },
     semanticSearchEnabled: false,
     semanticWeight: 0.6,
+    embeddingBackend: "xenova",
     embeddingModel: "Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2",
     verbose: false,
     jsonOutput: false,
